title: helichrysum subsimile
intro: Helichrysum subsimile, also known as Everlasting Flower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to South Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum subsimile include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
